summary: Completed testing of Bulk Assign feature for Collection Organizer. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: checkboxes appear on series cards, Select All/Deselect toggle works, bulk assign bar appears at bottom when series selected (shows count + target dropdown + Assign button), bulk assignment triggers API and updates UI with badges, Clear button deselects all, X button on badges removes assignment.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Plus39 supplier data with 4 series
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Assign feature fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/bulk-assign accepts {supplier, series_names[], group_slug, main_category, sub_categories[]}. Frontend data-testids: select-series-{name} for checkboxes, select-all-series for toggle, bulk-assign-bar for bottom bar, bulk-target-select for dropdown, bulk-assign-btn for assign button, clear-selection for clear. Plus39 has 4 series: Travertine (4), Burlington (3), Artisan (3), Moonlight (2). All test assignments were cleaned up after testing.

backend: Validation: requires supplier, series_names, group_slug, main_category
Bulk assign single series - works correctly
Bulk assign multiple series - works correctly
Bulk assign to group level (no sub_categories) - works correctly
Bulk assign verifies assignment via GET series endpoint
Bulk assign all 4 Plus39 series at once - works correctly
Existing endpoints (suppliers, series, category-tree, assign, unassign) still work
frontend: Checkboxes appear on each series card (data-testid='select-series-{name}')
Select All / Deselect toggle works in left panel header (data-testid='select-all-series')
Bulk assign bar appears at bottom when series selected (data-testid='bulk-assign-bar')
Bar shows count of selected collections (e.g., '2 collections selected')
Target dropdown shows category tree options (data-testid='bulk-target-select')
Assign button shows count and triggers bulk assignment (data-testid='bulk-assign-btn')
Toast notification confirms assignment (e.g., 'Assigned 2 series to Underfloor Heating > Electric UFH')
After bulk assign, selection clears and badges appear on series cards
Assignment badges also appear in category drop zones on the right
X button on badges removes assignment (unassign still works)
Drag-and-drop single assign still works alongside bulk assign
